name: Brazil's Fettuchinni Alfredo (Traditional)
recipeIngredient: 1 pint Heavy Cream, ok to use 1/2 & 1/2
Fresh Ground White Pepper -- to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter slowly in a heavy pan over medium heat.
2. Add garlic and sauté for a few minutes until fragrant but not browned. Remove garlic and discard.
3. Gradually incorporate cream (or light cream) into the melted butter using a whisk.
4. Season with salt, pepper, and nutmeg to taste.
5. Add cooked fettuccine noodles and 3 tablespoons of cooking liquid to the butter and cream mixture.
6. Toss the pasta until well coated in the sauce.
7. Remove from heat and gradually add Parmesan cheese by hand fulls. Not all of the cheese is necessary.
Variations:
Consider adding reconstituted porcini or shiitake mushrooms just before serving the pasta for added flavor.
